# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React-based frontend application for HR management, built with TypeScript and powered by Supabase. The application follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns.

## Technology Stack

- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build System**: Vite
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Edge Functions)
- **Routing**: React Router v6
- **State Management**: React hooks + Context API
- **UI Library**: Custom components built on shadcn/ui foundation
- **Testing**: Vitest + React Testing Library

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Component Organization
- **Atomic Design**: UI components organized by complexity (atoms, molecules, organisms)
- **Feature-based Structure**: Components grouped by business domain (attendance, payroll, etc.)
- **Layout Components**: Reusable layout primitives (AppLayout, AppSidebar, TopBar)

### Data Flow
- **Supabase Integration**: Direct database queries via Supabase client
- **Real-time Subscriptions**: Live updates for notifications and data changes
- **Optimistic Updates**: Immediate UI feedback with server synchronization

### Authentication & Security
- **Supabase Auth**: JWT-based authentication with role-based access control
- **Row Level Security**: Database-level permissions via RLS policies
- **Secure API Calls**: All backend communication through Supabase functions

## Core Components & Their Purposes

### Layout System
- `AppLayout`: Main application shell with responsive design
- `AppSidebar`: Navigation sidebar with role-based menu items
- `TopBar`: Header with user menu, notifications, and search
- `NotificationBell`: Real-time notification indicator
- `UserMenu`: User profile dropdown with logout functionality

### Employee Management
- `SearchableEmployeeSelect`: Type-ahead employee selection with avatars
- `MandatoryPasswordChange`: Secure first-time password setup modal
- `BeudoxLogo`: Brand-consistent logo component with multiple variants

### Business Logic Components
- `AttendanceUploadFlow`: Complex file upload workflow with AI parsing
- `LeaveBalancesTab`: Leave entitlement tracking and requests
- `PayrollSummary`: Salary and compensation overview
- `ProjectActivityLog`: Team activity tracking and reporting

### UI Component Library
- **Form Controls**: Input, Select, Textarea, Checkbox, RadioGroup
- **Feedback**: Toast notifications, Dialog modals, Alert banners
- **Data Display**: Table, Card, Badge, Avatar components
- **Navigation**: Breadcrumb, Tabs, Pagination
- **Layout**: Grid, Flexbox utilities, Resizable panels

## Key Files & Their Roles

### Entrypoints
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap and root rendering
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Main dashboard/home page component
- `src/App.tsx`: Root application component with routing

### Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Build configuration and plugins
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Styling system configuration
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript compiler options
- `supabase/config.toml`: Database schema and migrations config

### Core Logic
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Permission checking and role management
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Notification sending and management
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Database client configuration

### Business Logic
- `src/lib/attendance-format.ts`: Time and date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts`: Leave calculation and balance management
- `src/lib/review-schedule.ts`: Performance review scheduling logic
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts`: Activity logging and categorization

## Database Schema Relationships

### Core Entities
- **employees**: User profiles with company association
- **companies**: Organization settings and configuration
- **attendance_records**: Time tracking data with OT calculations
- **leave_requests**: Vacation and leave management
- **payroll_records**: Salary and compensation data
- **projects**: Team assignments and project tracking

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to companies
- Attendance records link to employees and companies
- Leave requests reference employees and approval workflows
- Payroll data connects to employee salary structures
- Projects associate with employees and companies

## Routing Structure

The application uses React Router with a pages-based structure:

- `/`: Dashboard/home page
- `/dashboard`: Main application dashboard
- `/profile`: Employee profile management
- `/attendance`: Attendance tracking and uploads
- `/leave`: Leave requests and balances
- `/payroll`: Salary and compensation views
- `/projects`: Project management interface
- `/settings`: Administrative configuration

## State Management Patterns

### Local State
- Component-level state with useState
- Form state management with controlled components
- Modal and dialog state handling

### Global State
- Authentication context via useAuth hook
- User preferences and settings
- Real-time data subscriptions

### Data Fetching
- Direct Supabase queries in components
- Custom hooks for data fetching logic
- Error handling with toast notifications

## Security Considerations

- **Authentication**: Supabase handles JWT tokens and session management
- **Authorization**: Role-based access control with database RLS
- **Data Validation**: TypeScript types ensure data integrity
- **API Security**: All backend calls go through Supabase functions
- **File Uploads**: Secure file handling with type validation

## Performance Optimizations

- **Code Splitting**: Route-based lazy loading
- **Bundle Optimization**: Vite's tree shaking and minification
- **Image Optimization**: Responsive images with lazy loading
- **Database Queries**: Indexed queries with selective field fetching
- **Caching**: Browser caching for static assets

## Development Workflow

- **Local Development**: Vite dev server with hot reload
- **Testing**: Unit tests with Vitest, E2E with Playwright
- **Linting**: ESLint with TypeScript rules
- **Building**: Optimized production builds with Vite
- **Deployment**: Static hosting with CDN distribution

## Integration Points

- **Supabase Functions**: Serverless backend logic
- **Email Service**: Notification delivery
- **File Storage**: Document and image uploads
- **External APIs**: Third-party integrations as needed

This architecture provides a scalable, maintainable foundation for HR management with modern web development practices and robust security measures.
